epics.title: Example delivery
epics.value: Consumers can copy a known-good plan shape.
epics.context: The example is intentionally small and has no remote side effects.
epics.expectedBehavior: The task can be validated before approval.
acceptanceCriteria: The example passes schema and semantic validation.

tasks.title: Validate the example
tasks.goal: Prove the example is structurally complete.
tasks.value: A new plan author has a copyable starting point.
tasks.context: The repository publishes a strict contract rather than an informal checklist.
tasks.expectedBehavior: Validation reports success without contacting GitHub.
scope: Run local schema and semantic validation
acceptanceCriteria: The example is accepted by the validator.
